mapper.insert: INSERT INTO file_table ( board_no, org_file_nm, stored_file_nm, file_size, file_category, menu_key, path_year, path_mmdd, relative_dir, relative_path, file_ext, mime_type, uploader_id, uploader_ip, is_deleted, ins_dt ) VALUES ( #{boardNo}, #{orgFileNm}, #{storedFileNm}, #{fileSize}, #{fileCategory}, #{menuKey}, #{pathYear}, #{pathMmdd}, #{relativeDir}, #{relativePath}, #{fileExt}, #{mimeType}, #{uploaderId}, #{uploaderIp}, COALESCE(#{isDeleted}, FALSE), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT file_id, board_no, org_file_nm, stored_file_nm, file_size, file_category, menu_key, path_year, path_mmdd, relative_dir, relative_path, file_ext, mime_type, uploader_id, uploader_ip, is_deleted, ins_dt, del_dt FROM file_table WHERE file_id = #{fileId} AND is_deleted = FALSE

SELECT file_id, board_no, org_file_nm, stored_file_nm, file_size, file_category, menu_key, path_year, path_mmdd, relative_dir, relative_path, file_ext, mime_type, uploader_id, uploader_ip, is_deleted, ins_dt, del_dt FROM file_table WHERE board_no = #{boardNo} AND is_deleted = FALSE ORDER BY ins_dt DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE file_table SET is_deleted = TRUE, del_dt = NOW() WHERE file_id = #{fileId} AND is_deleted = FALSE
UPDATE file_table SET is_deleted = TRUE, del_dt = NOW() WHERE board_no = #{boardNo} AND is_deleted = FALSE
